Uses of Class
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotBorder

    Fields in cc.quaternion.potshaper declared as PotBorder
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final PotBorder
    PotBorder.BLACK_MEDIUM
    A solid black border with a width of 2 points.
    static final PotBorder
    PotBorder.BLACK_THICK
    A solid black border with a width of 3 points.
    static final PotBorder
    PotBorder.BLACK_THIN
    A solid black border with a width of 1 point.
    static final PotBorder
    PotBorder.GRAY_THIN
    A solid gray border with a width of 1 point.
    static final PotBorder
    PotBorder.NONE
    A border with zero width, representing no visible border.

    Method
    Description

    Creates a new border with the specified color.

    Creates a dash-dot border with the specified width and color.

    Creates a dashed border with the specified width and color.
    static PotBorder

    Creates a dotted border with the specified width and color.
    static PotBorder
    PotBorder.none()
    Returns a border instance representing no visible border.
    static PotBorder
    PotBorder.solid()
    Creates a solid black border with a default width of 1 point.
    static PotBorder

    Creates a solid black border with the specified width.
    static PotBorder

    Creates a solid border with the specified width and color.

    Creates a new border with the specified width.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotImage
    PotImage.border(PotBorder border)
    Applies a border to the image.
    PotShape
    PotShape.border(PotBorder border)
    Applies a border to this shape.
    PotTable
    PotTable.border(PotBorder border)
    Applies the specified border style to all cells in the table.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.border(PotBorder border)
    Applies the same border style to all four sides of the cell.
    PotTextBox
    PotTextBox.border(PotBorder border)
    Applies a border configuration to the text box shape.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.borderBottom(PotBorder border)
    Applies a border style to the bottom edge of the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.borderLeft(PotBorder border)
    Applies a border style to the left edge of the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.borderRight(PotBorder border)
    Applies a border style to the right edge of the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.borderTop(PotBorder border)
    Applies a border style to the top edge of the cell.
    PotTable
    PotTable.innerBorder(PotBorder border)
    Applies the specified border style to all interior cell borders.
    PotConnector
    PotConnector.lineStyle(PotBorder border)
    Applies a complete border style to the connector line.
    PotTable
    PotTable.outerBorder(PotBorder border)
    Applies the specified border style to the outer perimeter of the table.
